name: J1939TestChkCreate_PGDistanceViolation
title: J1939TestChkCreate_PGDistanceViolation
syntax: long J1939TestChkCreate_PGDistanceViolation(dword refSource, dword refDest, dword refPgn, dword obsrvSource, dword obsrvDest, dword obsrvPgn, dword aMinDistance, dword aMaxDistance, char callback[] )
description: An event is generated if the time interval that starts on receipt of the reference message and ends with the receipt of the observed message is smaller than aMinDistance or is larger than aMaxDistance.

parameters.name: refSource
parameters.description: referenced source address of the PG or Null Address (0xFE) for wildcard

parameters.name: refDest
parameters.description: referenced destination address of the PG or Null Address (0xFE) for wildcard, ignored for broadcast PGs

parameters.name: obsrvSource
parameters.description: observed source address of the PG or Null Address (0xFE) for wildcard, ignored for broadcast PGs

parameters.name: obsrvDest
parameters.description: observed destination address of the PG or Null Address (0xFE) for wildcard, ignored for broadcast PGs

parameters.name: aMinDistance
parameters.description: minimum allowed distance between PGs in milliseconds, 0 < x < aMaxDistance

parameters.name: aMaxDistance
parameters.description: maximum allowed distance between PGs in milliseconds, aMinCycleTime < x < MAX_dword

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: name of the callback which is called when the check fails or 0, signature: void Callback( long checked )

return: referenced source address of the PG or Null
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
